en-US.name: Sax Reed Log: Rotation Tracker
en-US.subtitle: Clarinet Reed Care: Soak Guide
en-US.promotional_text: Saxophone or clarinet player? Know which reed to play today, how long to soak it, and when to retire it. Humidity-aware rotation and lifespan tracking.
en-US.description:
Stop losing track of your reed rotation. Sax Reed Log tells you exactly which reed to play today, how long to soak it, and when each reed is ready to retire, adjusted to your local humidity.

Every single-reed player knows the problem: a reed that played great last week feels stuffy today, your best reed dies before you notice, and you find mold in a humid case too late. Cane reacts to humidity, hours played, and rest. Tracking four to eight reeds by memory and sharpie numbers is a losing game.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add your reeds: brand, strength, and instrument. Rank each one A, B, C, or D after you play it.
2. Sax Reed Log checks the current humidity at your location and tracks each reed's hours, rest, and age.
3. You get today's pick, a humidity-adjusted soak time, and a lifespan estimate for every reed.

It takes 20 seconds to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Pick
Open the app and see which reed to play right now, with a humidity-adjusted soak time and the reason behind it.

Reed Lifespan
Each reed shows estimated playing hours remaining based on hours played, age, soak cycles, and humidity stress.

Playability Ranking
Rank every reed A through D after each session. The app weighs your feedback into each day's recommendation.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Track unlimited reeds (free version tracks two)
- Full rotation board: every reed ranked for today with an action
- 7-day humidity and soak forecast
- Break-in scheduler for new reeds
- Mold-risk alerts when humid storage gets dangerous
- Retire reminders before a reed dies mid-rehearsal
- Full per-reed history and multiple instrument setups

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All reed data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch humidity from a public weather service. Coordinates are never stored on any server.
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Sax Reed Log provides reed-care and rotation guidance based on general single-reed practice and cane material properties. Reed feel is subjective; always test a reed by playing it before relying on it. Estimates vary by brand, strength, climate, embouchure, and storage.

Terms of Use (EULA):
